name: Tim Barfoot
exact_department: University of Toronto Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS)
tech_stack: State Estimation Algorithms (e.g., SLAM, Optimization-based solvers)
recent_papers: Kernelized State Estimation for Mobile Robots
Certifiably Optimal Solvers for Robotics Applications
interest_paragraph: I am particularly drawn to Professor Barfoot's work in vision-based navigation and teach-and-repeat robotics, especially its application to autonomous navigation in unstructured environments. My background in AI agents aligns well with developing intelligent perception and control systems for mobile robots, and I am keen to explore topics such as certifiably optimal state estimation or radar localization for self-driving vehicles within the University of Toronto.
